# zabbix_sla (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the SLA.
- `period` (Number) SLA reporting period. 0=daily, 1=weekly, 2=monthly, 3=quarterly, 4=annually.
- `slo` (Number) Service level objective (percent).

### Optional

- `description` (String) SLA description.
- `effective_date` (Number) Effective date as Unix timestamp.
- `excluded_downtime` (Block List) Excluded downtime windows as Unix timestamps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--excluded_downtime))
- `schedule` (Block List) SLA schedule windows as seconds from week start. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--schedule))
- `service_tag` (Block List) Service tag filters for this SLA. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--service_tag))
- `status` (Number) SLA status. 0=enabled, 1=disabled.
- `timezone` (String) Timezone for SLA calculations.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--excluded_downtime"></a>
### Nested Schema for `excluded_downtime`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `period_from` (Number)
- `period_to` (Number)


<a id="nestedblock--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

- `period_from` (Number)
- `period_to` (Number)


<a id="nestedblock--service_tag"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service_tag`

Required:

- `tag` (String)

Optional:

- `operator` (Number)
- `value` (String)
